spec_match.rationale: Superb documentation of RWS historical milestones, third-party cookie pivots, UK CMA decisions, and Chrome 152 deprecation plans.

interactive.rationale: Fully interactive timeline. User can toggle interactive category filter buttons and click individual milestones to expand or collapse specific descriptive summaries.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with parent: shows scrollable timeline, works-vs-removed feature tables, and companion links.

edge_cases.rationale: Provides clear breakdowns of cookie attribute combinations.

references.rationale: Includes target links to the ChromeStatus entry.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful CSS timeline dots, vertical lanes, color-coded status columns, responsive filter buttons, and breadcrumb bars.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP v152 sweep loaded the copied concept, exercised every detected control, found named controls, and reported no post-triage runtime/action failure.

conformance.rationale: A v152 suite now carries the same feature-ID/spec contract without modifying the immutable source-milestone suite.

summary: A highly detailed, gorgeous, and now fully interactive historical timeline tracing the lifecycle of Related Website Sets. Features fluid category filtering and card expansions driven by clean native JS.
